---
title: "5-assignment"
format: html
---

Solar Project Valuation

Planning

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(here)
knitr::include_graphics(here("5-assignment","flowchart.jpg"))
```

Contract 
Module 1: Calculate expected annual revenue 
Input: 
Historical hourly locational marginal price (LMP) of nearest node rates for previous years ($/kWh)
 Hourly power generation (kW) estimate for the latitude and longitude of selected site 
Function:
annual_rev = Sum(hourly kW * ($/KW) [use For loop to sum (8760 values)]
Output: 
Annual revenue estimate in $/year

Module 2: Discount Revenue over 25 years. 
Input: 
Module 1 output (annual_rev)
y(year) loop for 25 years 
Parameters:
r (Discount Rate)
Function:
Dis_rev = annual_rev/ (1 + r) ^ y 
Output: dis_rev, discounted revenue as single $ value for 25 year project 

Module 3: Discount Operations and Maintenance Costs
Input: 
om (System operations and maintenance cost ($/kw/yr) )
Parameters:
r (Discount Rate)
Function: 
Om_y1 = size * om 
cost = om_y1/(1+r)^y


Module 4: Estimate Net System Costs
Input: 
Module 2 Output 
Module 3 Output
invest_cost (System Construction Cost in year 0 ($/kw))
y(year) loop for 25 years 
Parameters: 
***potentially adding a subsidy here if have time 
Function: 
Net_npv = invest_cost + cost + dis_rev)

Final Output: Net present value of the project over 25 years (single $ value)
